summary: Added Owner's Notes accordion section to HealthRecordsSection. Imported useState from react and petsApi from the API client. Destructured pet and handlePetUpdated from usePetProfileContext (both were already present in the PetProfileContext interface). Added editingNotes (boolean) and notesValue (string) state. Added handleSaveNotes which calls petsApi.update(petId, { owners_notes: notesValue }, token) then calls handlePetUpdated with the result. Inserted the new accordion between the Vaccinations and Card Alerts accordions, using the same health-accordion CSS class pattern. Display mode shows notes text or 'No owner's notes yet' placeholder with Edit button (gated on token truthy). Edit mode shows textarea pre-filled with current notes plus Save/Cancel buttons.
notes_for_reviewer: The badge uses className='health-badge' as specified in the plan. Other accordions use 'badge badge-warning' etc. from a different badge system. Reviewer should confirm 'health-badge' is the correct class for this context or switch to a standard badge class.

The textarea and button container use inline styles (display:flex, gap, etc.) rather than utility classes. The existing codebase uses both patterns; inline styles were chosen here to avoid depending on utility classes that may not exist for this specific layout.
Cancel handler resets notesValue to pet.owners_notes at cancel time (reading from the pet prop), which reflects the latest saved value.
